content:
# Wire everything together in main and test end-to-end

Connect all modules in main.rs: parse CLI args, init GitHub client, start event loop, render UI, and handle async issue fetching.

## Scope
- `src/main.rs` — orchestration
- Async issue fetching on startup and on refresh (`r`)
- Error handling with user-visible messages (e.g. auth failure, network error)
- Graceful terminal restore on panic

## Inputs
- [Spec](intent://local/note/spec)
- Depends on: Tasks 1-4

## Definition of Done
- `cargo build` succeeds
- Running with a valid `GITHUB_TOKEN` and repo shows the issue list
- Navigation, detail view, filtering, and refresh all work
- App exits cleanly with `q`

## Verification
```
cargo build
GITHUB_TOKEN=$GITHUB_TOKEN cargo run -- ratatui/ratatui
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [x] `cargo build` succeeds
- [x] main.rs wires CLI args → GitHub client → event loop → UI
- [x] Issues fetched async on startup with loading state
- [x] `r` key triggers re-fetch
- [x] Enter in list view fetches full issue body via `get_issue`
- [x] Filter changes (o/c/a) trigger re-fetch
- [x] Panic hook restores terminal
- [x] Clean exit on `q`

## Changes

- `src/main.rs` — Full rewrite. Wired CLI arg parsing (owner/repo), GITHUB_TOKEN validation, panic hook, terminal init/restore, async issue fetching on startup, main event loop with refresh/filter/detail-fetch support, and octocrab→app::Issue conversion.

## Verification
- `cargo build` — ✅ succeeds, no warnings
- `cargo check` — ✅ clean
title: Wire everything together in main and test end-to-end
